title: 字母袖扣谋杀案
summary:
Richard Nigges proposes a plan to Jenny (Jane Hobbs) to seek redemption for their roles in the deaths of Patrick and Frances Ives. He suggests that they voluntarily choose to be sentenced to death, claiming he has convinced Harriet Sipprell and Ada Gransbury to join this act of self-sacrifice to achieve God's forgiveness. Although Jenny is initially skeptical, she meets Harriet and Ada two days later and finds that they have indeed changed and expressed remorse for their past actions. The group agrees to act as judges, jury, and executioners, signing their own death warrants to correct their past mistakes.

The group's consensus is interrupted when Harriet demands that Nancy Duane also be killed. Harriet argues that Nancy is guilty because she seduced Patrick and caused the scandal that led to Frances's suicide, claiming Nancy confessed to acting out of jealousy to hurt Frances. While Jenny defends Nancy and suspects Harriet is lying, Richard eventually agrees with Harriet, stating that Nancy's improper relationship and the resulting public scandal make her equally guilty. Richard concludes that they cannot sacrifice themselves while leaving a guilty person alive. Two weeks later, Richard meets Jenny alone to reveal his decision on how to proceed with their plan.
